news.t: Trade the Titans: Direxion Debuts New Suite of Leveraged & Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: TEXU is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 19.41%, SLB N.V. at 14.84%, The Williams Companies at 12.94%, ConocoPhillips at 12.81%, and Chevron at 12.65%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Energy Top 5 Bull 2X ETF (TEXU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund is passively managed, providing 2x leveraged exposure to an equally-weighted index of the top 5 largest US companies in the energy sector. TEXU was launched on Oct 1, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
infoTable: S&P 500 Energy (Sector) Top 5 Equal Capped Index
